name: Angry Birds VR: Isle of Pigs

reviews.review_description: One of the best games finally released for the oculus go ☺️
It was fun should a 5 dollar game in my opinion.... still worth  it.. if you like the game.. my girlfriend fell asleep early  Friday... so good time play..
Absolutely love this game! Very addictive & like you’re really in the game
Good little game

Brilliant, really enjoyed this game, I couldn't believe that it was over. I really love games like this, and nothing else matters when you are in the middle of it. Keep making more like this, love it. Thanks
Considering how many levels you get on any other platform, this version is a major deception. I do like the gameplay with its angles.

developer_response.body: Hello, thank you for sharing your thoughts about the game. Hopefully we can bring out more levels to this version of the game in the future. As much as we would like to, we can unfortunately not make any promises right now. We will just have to wait and see what happens in the future.

reviews.review_description: This is one of my favorite games. I must admit with other that the game is too short however it is a lot of fun and worth the price. I can’t believe how fantastic the graphics are my favorite is the black exploding birds this game I wish much success and I hope that you can add some extra levels of this game in an update if at all possible thank you again for a very enjoyable game.￼￼

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words! We hope that we can add more levels to the game in the future.

reviews.review_description: Cool game, but for $10 I expected it to be longer and more levels.
I paid then downloaded it. took for while to keep updating the game but still doesn't work. tried to go thu the refund process and took even longer and still couldn't do anything

developer_response.body: Hello! We're really sorry to hear that you're experiencing this issue. Unfortunately we don't manage the download/update process, but please feel free to reach out to us at support@resolutiongames.com and we can help you look into it.

reviews.review_title: This Is A Very Short Game
reviews.review_description: And for ten dollars... it is disappointing.

developer_response.body: We appreciate your feedback and we've noted that this is a request.  Thank you for sharing!

reviews.review_title: A Great Game Just Got Better
reviews.review_description: This game is brilliant this is how all angry birds games should be. A total must have game for all Go users.

I like the graphics; they're not as nauseating as other games. THE FRAMES! I like it when there are enough frames to not even notice the fact i have a box on my face. Lastly i love the puzzles, of how to knock a tower down with the least amount of birds.
Now for the cons: there is a lack of levels. I spent only a few hours taking the pigs down a peg. But the timely experience is completely different from the mobile games. Basically I'd love it if there was a sequel! Or DLC.

developer_response.body: We're really glad to hear that you enjoy the game, TechMeyer! We can't share any new at this point in time, but we really appreciate hearing your thoughts on the game and we take it into consideration for the future.

reviews.review_description: It’s cool but very short And also it is very hard on the one were you have to rotate your slingshot but overall it’s a great game and very fun (hard)
Would be great if more levels

Like the phone version on Crack! 
Has 3 dimensional graphics and you can shoot the birds from different angles .
I finished the whole thing the first night.
It's my favorite game so far for my Oculus go 😃
It's super addictive!
Sweet

As a long time angry birds fan on mobile, I was excited to try it in VR. And I was so let down. Angry birds on the Oculus go is simply amazing. I hope they add more levels or make an angry birds two soon
My son says it's the best. He's thrilled to have a vr headset and so far thrilled with games for it.
Yet too expensive for 4 small worlds.
